description: Automatically appends newlines to the end of the document as you type. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: usero2-endofday
manifest.description: Automatically appends newlines to the end of the document as you type.
manifest.name: Infinite Note

name: Infinite Note

releases.author: usero2
releases.description:
Initial Release

Infinite Note is an Obsidian plugin that automatically appends newlines to the end of your document. It provides a true "infinite scroll" experience—whether you are typing or just navigating down with your arrow keys, you will never hit the absolute bottom of the editor again!
